steps.title: Spot the signal
steps.content: The first sentence ends with “though for different reasons,” indicating that the second sentence will present a contrast between Kramrisch's and Bing's reasons for receiving the award.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
By contrast marks the difference between the two achievements — Kramrisch honored for her work as an art historian, Bing for her work as a photographer.

The other three choices fail because they don't mark contrast: “for instance” suggests elaboration, “in other words” suggests restating the same idea, and “as a result” marks causation.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
